definition: The right of the people to be secure in their persons houses papers and effects against unreasonable searches and seizures
violation: Unreasonable seizure of child from mother's home - Judge Crouch threatened Amber Alert warrant in different state
result: Child removed via ex parte order without proper hearing
notes: TN Amber Alert requires imminent danger of bodily injury or death plus abduction criteria not met. SC Amber Alert requires child taken unlawfully without permission from parent or legal guardian - mother IS the legal guardian

definition: No state shall deprive any person of life liberty or property without due process of law
violation: Mother denied meaningful hearing before custody change - ex parte order issued without adversarial process
result: Custody changed from ~87% to ~1% without full hearing
notes: Fundamental liberty interest in care custody and control of children - Troxel v. Granville 530 US 57 (2000)

definition: No state shall deny to any person within its jurisdiction the equal protection of the laws
violation: Pro se mother treated differently than represented parties - unequal access to justice
result: Mother penalized for lack of appearance while unrepresented facing 3+ attorneys
notes: Court has obligation to ensure pro se litigants can meaningfully participate
